title: How Random Noise and a Graphical Convention Subverted Behavioral Scientists' Explanations of Self-Assessment Data: Numeracy Underlies Better Alternatives
version_note: Numeracy 10(1), article 4. Open access under CC BY-NC 4.0, so access_status is open_fulltext. This session only the abstract was read; the PDF body returned 403 to the fetch tool, so linked evidence stays abstract_only and unpublished until the full text is read.
